title: fix(deps): update module github.com/moby/buildkit to v0.18.2
body:

| [github.com/moby/buildkit](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit) | `v0.18.1` -> `v0.18.2` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fmoby%2fbuildkit/v0.18.2?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![adoption](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/adoption/go/github.com%2fmoby%2fbuildkit/v0.18.2?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![passing](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/compatibility/go/github.com%2fmoby%2fbuildkit/v0.18.1/v0.18.2?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fmoby%2fbuildkit/v0.18.1/v0.18.2?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>moby/buildkit (github.com/moby/buildkit)</summary>

### [`v0.18.2`](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/releases/tag/v0.18.2)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/compare/v0.18.1...v0.18.2)

buildkit 0.18.2

Welcome to the v0.18.2 release of buildkit!

Please try out the release binaries and report any issues at
https://github.com/moby/buildkit/issues.

##### Notable Changes

-   Builtin Dockerfile frontend has been updated to v1.12.1 [changelog](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/releases/tag/dockerfile%2F1.12.1)
-   Fix possible concurrent map write error [#​5577](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/5577)
-   Update Runc to v1.2.3 to fix possible build error when using parallel cache mounts [#​5588](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/5588) [#​5590](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/5590)

##### Dependency Changes

This release has no dependency changes

Previous release can be found at [v0.18.1](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/releases/tag/v0.18.1)

</details>
